content.en:
Inside the Genjin Pavilion.

Ye Tian and the other twelve ancestors all came and sat down one by one.

Ye Tian also had a general understanding of the situation, but he didn't know much.

When the True River Sword Ancestor and the other Twelve Ancestors saw Ye Tian and felt Ye Tian's cultivation, they were immediately shocked.

"Congratulations to the Endless Ancestor for advancing to the Extreme Realm!"

"Congratulations to the Endless Ancestor for advancing to the Extreme Realm!"

"Congratulations to the Endless Ancestor for advancing to the Extreme Realm!"

The Twelve Ancestors congratulated one after another.

They even felt that Ye Tian's strength was even more terrifying than theirs, but it was difficult to say how many extreme realms they had reached, but they were definitely above the first extreme realm.

For a while, everyone's attitude towards Ye Tian changed slightly, maybe even they didn't notice it, that is, there was a trace of respect.

Soon, everyone returned to the topic.

True River Sword Ancestor spoke: "Everyone, this meeting is mainly to discuss a big event that has happened recently, and you must know that many Space-Time Lords have sent many Extreme Realms to the Source Sea, just to find an opportunity. "

Feng Gu Yuan Ancestor followed: "I don't know much about this matter, I only know that it has something to do with the chance of 100,000 eternal years, but I have been born less than 60,000 eternal years so far, and I don't know much about such a long time. "

"I don't know much more!"

Ye Tian shook his head.

One eternal year is equivalent to a million eons of years, how many eternal years has he lived?

Therefore, he didn't know such a secret at all.

Seeing this, the True River Sword Ancestor spoke: "Actually, I should be the only one in the half-step Eternal Realm in the Source God Pavilion who has truly experienced 100,000 eternal years. One hundred thousand years ago, it was the era before the beginning of the source sea, many eternal realms fought to grab a chance, and the fallen eternal realm alone reached more than double digits, countless eternal worlds were exploded, endless small worlds were shattered and turned into nothingness, and the supreme beings who were affected and killed did not know how many, I am a half-step eternal realm who was lucky to survive. "

"It is said that every 100,000 eternal years, a chance will be born in the source sea, and the last chance is too precious, which makes many eternal realms moved, and this is why such a terrifying war broke out. I learned from a secret source that the last chance was a supreme treasure that could make the strength of the Eternal Realm skyrocket, and even have the hope of surpassing other Eternal Realms, but I don't know exactly what it was, and I don't even know who it fell into. "

"However, after the last Eternal Realm war, the Lords Alliance stipulated that the Eternal Realm should not stay in the Source Sea for a long time, and this time there should not be a big war like the last one. However, once that opportunity is discovered, there are definitely not a few Eternal Realms who participate in the war. "

The True River Sword Ancestor said for a long time, so that Ye Tian and the others basically understood the situation.

At this time, they are also very interested in such an opportunity.

If they get such an opportunity, will they be able to become eternal?

Of course, it is more likely that when he was competing for the opportunity, he was pinched to death by an Eternal Realm.

Unless it was lucky, when the fate was born, there was no movement, and it happened to be discovered by them.

According to what we learned, when the fate was just born, there was a vision, and although the vision did not cover a large area, there was a great possibility that it could be discovered.

Especially now that the major forces have dispatched countless manpower, once the opportunity arises, it will inevitably be discovered.

meeting.

There are half-step Eternal Realm proposing not to participate in this matter, and there are also half-step Eternal Realm proposing to gamble, what if you are lucky?

Obviously, many half-step Eternal Realms were still extremely eager for such an opportunity, perhaps this was the only hope they had for the Eternal Realm.

At last.

Zhenhe Sword Ancestor said: "I don't really recommend you to participate in it, and in this era, it is easy to conflict with those extreme realms that have come from the space-time territory, if you are not ready to participate, this time is a good retreat, if there is an unexpected situation, everyone will share it." In the unlikely event that a great war breaks out in the Eternal Realm by chance, I will provide a place for everyone to take refuge. "

Soon, the meeting ended.

A half-step Eternal Realm left, and Ye Tian also left.

......

"What is the chance of a 100,000 eternal years?"

Ye Tian was a little curious.

If he didn't endanger his life and affect the Dark Forbidden Realm, he wouldn't mind getting involved, if he really got a little benefit, I am afraid it would be enough for him to grow to the Eternal Realm.

Perhaps, this is also the idea of many half-step Eternal Realms.

Time passed, and more and more extreme realms came to the Source Sea from the major space-time lords, and naturally there were some conflicts with the major forces.

There are often rumors of some Supreme being being killed, and most of them involve Extreme Realm half-step Eternal Realm powerhouses from the space-time territory.

Ye Tian, on the other hand, is very low-key, has been cultivating, and the Dark Forbidden Domain is very calm.

Before you know it, hundreds of thousands of years have passed.

The opportunity to be born once in a hundred thousand eternal years has not yet appeared, and even those eternal realms are in a hurry, and even some eternal realms have personally come to the source sea to explore some areas, but they quickly left again.

Hall of Void Source.

Ye Tian finished his cultivation.

At this time, he had already cultivated to the level of the Five Extremes Realm, after all, he had no bottlenecks before the level of the Seven Extremes Realm, he only needed to improve his cultivation, and his strength would increase.

However, after cultivating to the Five Extremes Realm, he used up the resources on his body almost, although there were still a few treasures left, but even if he took them out to trade resources, he couldn't exchange them for many precious resources.

this day.

The Void Source Palace's machine spirit came to inform Ye Tian of a big matter.

"Master, something has changed outside the Void Source Palace. "

The machine spirit reported.

Changes outside the Void Source Temple?

Ye Tian's expression was shocked.

The Void Source Hall is located in a forbidden place in the Source Sea, and this forbidden place is the Sea of Silence.

Even a half-step Eternal Realm like the Void Source Ancestor didn't dare to step into the Sea of Silence, and threw the Void Source Hall into the Sea of Silence, and the enemies of the Void Source Ancestor didn't dare to enter the Sea of Silence to find the Void Source Hall.

This shows the horror of the Sea of Silence.

Even the half-step Eternal Realm at the level of the First Extreme Realm did not dare to venture into the Sea of Silence, because the Sea of Silence would have a strange power, and people who were not determined would completely fall silent and turn into a floating corpse in the Sea of Silence.

Although the Void Source Hall can resist the power of the Sea of Silence, once it goes out, it still can't.

There have been experiments in the Extreme Realm, and basically the strength of the Three Extreme Realms or more is required to walk in the Sea of Silence, but there are also certain dangers, and only the half-step Eternal Realm above the Six Extremes Realm can ignore the dangers of the Sea of Silence.

Wow!

Ye Tian's copy body directly walked out of the Void Source Hall and came to the Sea of Silence.

Airplanes!!!!

One after another forces attacked, and Ye Tian, whose will had reached the second order of the Will World, was almost comparable to the Eternal Realm in terms of will, so he ignored these strange powers.

Ye Tian probed around and found an amazing scene.
